evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Build datamodels; Optimize performance through DAX; user-friendly data presentation; Establish standards and best practices
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Mixed: optimization and standards emphasis alongside delivery; no velocity/speed language but client-facing consulting context suggests execution pace.
evidence.domain_risk: consulting/professional services model; diverse client base; no sector risk signals
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Moderate: professional services BI delivery; errors affect client decisions without regulatory/financial reporting consequence.
evidence.collaboration_width: multidisciplinary teams; client teams; junior team members
evidence.data_team_maturity: Design and implement data-driven applications; Architect data solutions; Mentor junior team members
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mid: mentoring responsibility suggests growing team; named tools and standardization indicate established but scaling function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design and implement data-driven applications; Architect data solutions using Azure services; Build datamodels and dashboards; Optimize performance through DAX and M-query
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Hiring manager: specific technical ownership (architecting, building, optimizing) with named tools and methodologies.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Serve as consultant to clients, translating business requirements; multidisciplinary teams; client-facing work or proprietary product development
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Mixed: client/consulting focus (business translation) mixed with internal analytics platform development choice.
evidence.autonomy_level: Design and implement; Architect data solutions; Serve as consultant; Mentor; Establish standards
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Mixed: strategic consulting role translating requirements AND hands-on execution of technical solutions.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: JD mentions AI-driven methodologies in company context but not as expected candidate skill.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Absent: standards/best practices mentioned broadly but no explicit testing or data quality ownership framed.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: None: JD framed around capability, delivery, and mentoring with no risk/reliability language.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design and implement applications; Architect solutions; Build models; Mentor teams
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mixed: both new analytics solution design for clients and internal platform development choice.
evidence.language_gate: Fluent Dutch language skills required (written and spoken)
